race.comment: KORITSI (7) came home strongly last start to finish second, beaten 0.7 lengths over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Keeps improving and is well placed in this contest. Keeps Lever and is well placed to be winning. WOOTTON PLEASE (11) was much better at Tuncurry on a slow surface and can build on that over the longer sprint. Has a low gate and is sure to keep improving for a leading barn. BEEN THERE (2) debuts for the Lane yard and has trialled four times at the provincials. Has the blinkers on and a bold run is in the cards. Hutchings sticks with FROGMORE (6), and she finally draws low. She can show more here.
